column8: Angular red bricks and concrete fragments with some grey, silty SAND. (FILL)
Sub-rounded GRAVEL and COBBLES of moderately decomposed granite.
Wash boring. (No recovery) and tuff with some brown, silty SAND, ALLUVIUM.

Moderately strong, brownish pink, coarse grained TUFF with moderately decomposed, medium to coarse grained GRANITE, closely spaced, very narrow, rough, planar, slightly iron stained, chlorite and kaolin coated joints dipping 10 degrees, 20 degrees, 40 degrees-50 degrees & 75 degrees-85 degrees.
